scripts.serve: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');try{const hash=execSync('git rev-parse --short HEAD',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim();fs.writeFileSync('version.json',JSON.stringify({commit:hash,date:new Date().toISOString()}));}catch(e){fs.writeFileSync('version.json',JSON.stringify({commit:'unknown',date:new Date().toISOString()}));}" && npx http-server ./ -p 8080 -s
